chrome.exe.name: Google Chrome
chrome.exe.description: Web browser. RAM usage increases with open tabs.

msedge.exe.name: Microsoft Edge
msedge.exe.description: Chromium-based browser. Similar RAM behavior to Chrome.

firefox.exe.name: Mozilla Firefox
firefox.exe.description: Open-source web browser. Generally lighter than Chrome.

opera.exe.name: Opera Browser
opera.exe.description: Chromium-based with built-in VPN and ad blocker.

brave.exe.name: Brave Browser
brave.exe.description: Privacy-focused Chromium browser with ad blocking.

python.exe.name: Python Interpreter
python.exe.description: Runs Python scripts. Usage depends on script complexity.

pythonw.exe.name: Python (No Console)
pythonw.exe.description: Python without console window. Used by GUI apps like PC_Workman.

node.exe.name: Node.js Runtime
node.exe.description: JavaScript runtime for server-side apps and dev tools.

code.exe.name: Visual Studio Code
code.exe.description: Popular code editor. Extensions increase resource usage.

discord.exe.name: Discord
discord.exe.description: Voice, video, and text chat platform for communities.

spotify.exe.name: Spotify
spotify.exe.description: Music streaming service. Background playback is lightweight.

steam.exe.name: Steam Client
steam.exe.description: Game distribution platform. Background overlay can impact games.

epicgameslauncher.exe.name: Epic Games Launcher
epicgameslauncher.exe.description: Game launcher and store. Heavy when updating games.

riotclientservices.exe.name: Riot Client
riotclientservices.exe.description: Launcher for League of Legends, Valorant, TFT.

explorer.exe.name: Windows Explorer
explorer.exe.description: Windows shell and file manager. Critical system process.

svchost.exe.name: Service Host
svchost.exe.description: Hosts Windows services. Multiple instances are normal.

system.name: System Process
system.description: Core Windows NT kernel and system threads. Always running.

dwm.exe.name: Desktop Window Manager
dwm.exe.description: Manages visual effects, transparency, and window composition.

taskmgr.exe.name: Task Manager
taskmgr.exe.description: Windows Task Manager for monitoring and managing processes.

csrss.exe.name: Client Server Runtime
csrss.exe.description: Critical Windows subsystem. Handles console windows and threads.

winlogon.exe.name: Windows Logon
winlogon.exe.description: Manages user login/logout and Ctrl+Alt+Del screen.

lsass.exe.name: Local Security Authority
lsass.exe.description: Handles Windows security policy and authentication.

nvcontainer.exe.name: NVIDIA Container
nvcontainer.exe.description: Hosts NVIDIA services like GeForce Experience and telemetry.

nvdisplay.container.exe.name: NVIDIA Display Container
nvdisplay.container.exe.description: Manages NVIDIA Control Panel and display settings.

runtimebroker.exe.name: Runtime Broker
runtimebroker.exe.description: Manages permissions for UWP apps. High RAM = app permission bug.

searchindexer.exe.name: Windows Search Indexer
searchindexer.exe.description: Indexes files for faster search. Heavy during initial indexing.

antimalwareservice.exe.name: Windows Defender
antimalwareservice.exe.description: Windows Defender antivirus. Scans can be CPU-intensive.

git.exe.name: Git Version Control
git.exe.description: Distributed version control system for code repositories.

docker.exe.name: Docker Desktop
docker.exe.description: Container platform. Heavy when running multiple containers.

teams.exe.name: Microsoft Teams
teams.exe.description: Business communication platform. Heavy during video calls.

zoom.exe.name: Zoom Meetings
zoom.exe.description: Video conferencing app. GPU acceleration recommended.

skype.exe.name: Skype
skype.exe.description: Video calls and messaging. Legacy version, being replaced by Teams.

vlc.exe.name: VLC Media Player
vlc.exe.description: Versatile media player. Lightweight and open-source.

obs64.exe.name: OBS Studio
obs64.exe.description: Screen recording and streaming software. GPU encoding recommended.

photoshop.exe.name: Adobe Photoshop
photoshop.exe.description: Professional image editing. RAM usage depends on file size.

illustrator.exe.name: Adobe Illustrator
illustrator.exe.description: Vector graphics editor. GPU acceleration for complex artwork.

excel.exe.name: Microsoft Excel
excel.exe.description: Spreadsheet application. Large files can be CPU-intensive.

winword.exe.name: Microsoft Word
winword.exe.description: Document editor. Generally lightweight unless heavy formatting.

powerpnt.exe.name: Microsoft PowerPoint
powerpnt.exe.description: Presentation software. Videos and animations increase usage.

outlook.exe.name: Microsoft Outlook
outlook.exe.description: Email and calendar client. Syncing large mailboxes is heavy.

valorant.exe.name: Valorant
valorant.exe.description: Competitive tactical shooter. CPU-heavy for high FPS.

league of legends.exe.name: League of Legends
league of legends.exe.description: MOBA game. Moderate requirements, optimized for older hardware.

csgo.exe.name: Counter-Strike: GO
csgo.exe.description: Competitive FPS. CPU-bound for high frame rates.

fortnite.exe.name: Fortnite
fortnite.exe.description: Battle royale game. DX12 mode recommended for newer GPUs.

gta5.exe.name: Grand Theft Auto V
gta5.exe.description: Open-world game. GPU-heavy with high settings.

minecraft.exe.name: Minecraft
minecraft.exe.description: Sandbox block game. Java Edition is CPU-heavy; Bedrock is more optimized. Chunk loading spikes CPU.

javaw.exe.name: Java Runtime
javaw.exe.description: Runs Java applications. Used by Minecraft and development tools.

wininit.exe.name: Windows Initialization
wininit.exe.description: Starts critical Windows services during boot.

services.exe.name: Services Control Manager
services.exe.description: Manages Windows services. Critical system process.

spoolsv.exe.name: Print Spooler
spoolsv.exe.description: Manages print job queue and printer communication. Persistent high CPU without printing may indicate malware.

audiodg.exe.name: Windows Audio Device Graph
audiodg.exe.description: Handles audio processing and software effects pipeline. High CPU can indicate a bad audio driver or heavy effect chain.

conhost.exe.name: Console Window Host
conhost.exe.description: Renders console windows for CMD, PowerShell, and CLI tools. One instance per open console.

cmd.exe.name: Command Prompt
cmd.exe.description: Windows command-line interpreter. Used for scripts and admin tasks.

powershell.exe.name: Windows PowerShell
powershell.exe.description: Advanced scripting shell for automation and admin tasks.

calculator.exe.name: Calculator
calculator.exe.description: Windows calculator app. Minimal resource usage.

msiexec.exe.name: Windows Installer
msiexec.exe.description: Runs .msi installer packages. Should only appear during software installations. Impersonation by malware is possible.

trustedinstaller.exe.name: Windows Modules Installer
trustedinstaller.exe.description: Installs Windows updates. High CPU during update installation.

vmmem.name: WSL 2 Virtual Machine
vmmem.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux 2 memory process.

wsl.exe.name: Windows Subsystem for Linux
wsl.exe.description: Entry point for WSL Linux environment. Launches Linux distro processes inside a lightweight VM.

windowsterminal.exe.name: Windows Terminal
windowsterminal.exe.description: Modern terminal for cmd, PowerShell, and WSL. GPU-accelerated.

malwarebytes.exe.name: Malwarebytes
malwarebytes.exe.description: Anti-malware protection. Scans can be CPU-intensive.

ccleaner.exe.name: CCleaner
ccleaner.exe.description: System cleaner and optimizer. Use with caution on registry.

torrent.exe.name: BitTorrent Client
torrent.exe.description: P2P file sharing. Can saturate bandwidth and slow network.

utorrent.exe.name: uTorrent
utorrent.exe.description: Lightweight torrent client. Limit upload/download for performance.

winrar.exe.name: WinRAR
winrar.exe.description: Archive extraction and compression tool. CPU-heavy during compression.

7zfm.exe.name: 7-Zip File Manager
7zfm.exe.description: Open-source file archiver. Compression can peg CPU; ultra preset runs mostly single-threaded.

everything.exe.name: Everything Search
everything.exe.description: Instant file search using NTFS MFT indexing. Finds any file in milliseconds; extremely lightweight.

anydesk.exe.name: AnyDesk
anydesk.exe.description: Remote desktop software. Lightweight and fast.

teamviewer.exe.name: TeamViewer
teamviewer.exe.description: Remote support and access. Heavier than AnyDesk.

bluestacks.exe.name: BlueStacks
bluestacks.exe.description: Android emulator for PC. Very resource-intensive.

memu.exe.name: MEmu Play
memu.exe.description: Android emulator optimized for gaming. Heavy RAM usage.

vmware.exe.name: VMware Workstation
vmware.exe.description: Virtual machine software. Resource usage depends on VM settings.

virtualbox.exe.name: Oracle VM VirtualBox
virtualbox.exe.description: Free virtualization software. Similar resource needs to VMware.

claude.exe.name: Claude Desktop
claude.exe.description: Anthropic's Claude AI assistant desktop app. Electron-based, GPU-accelerated inference.

datatransfer.exe.name: Data Transfer Host
datatransfer.exe.description: Part of Windows Connected Devices Platform. Handles data sync between devices.

wmiprvse.exe.name: WMI Provider Host
wmiprvse.exe.description: Windows Management Instrumentation host. Feeds hardware data to monitoring tools.

msmpeng.exe.name: Windows Defender Engine
msmpeng.exe.description: Core antivirus engine for Windows Defender. CPU spikes during background scans.

registry.name: Windows Registry Process
registry.description: NT kernel process managing the Windows registry hive in memory. Always present.

hitman2.exe.name: HITMAN 2
hitman2.exe.description: Stealth action game. GPU-heavy with high detail; benefits from fast SSD streaming.

hitman3.exe.name: HITMAN World of Assassination
hitman3.exe.description: Stealth sandbox game (HITMAN 3 / WoA). Ray-tracing support; VRAM-hungry at 4K.

hitman.exe.name: HITMAN (2016)
hitman.exe.description: Reboot of the Hitman franchise. CPU-intensive AI and crowd simulation.

wermgr.exe.name: Windows Error Reporting
wermgr.exe.description: Collects and sends crash reports to Microsoft. Spikes after app crashes.

sihost.exe.name: Shell Infrastructure Host
sihost.exe.description: Manages background shell elements including wallpaper and taskbar features. Required by Explorer.

fontdrvhost.exe.name: Font Driver Host
fontdrvhost.exe.description: Sandboxed process for font rendering. Two instances (System + User) are always normal.

smss.exe.name: Session Manager Subsystem
smss.exe.description: First user-mode process started by NT kernel. Manages Windows sessions.

dllhost.exe.name: COM Surrogate
dllhost.exe.description: Hosts COM objects for Explorer (thumbnail generation, codec previews). Multiple instances are normal. Can be spoofed by malware.

taskhostw.exe.name: Task Host Window
taskhostw.exe.description: Hosts scheduled tasks and COM objects at logon and logoff. Multiple instances are normal.

telegram.exe.name: Telegram Desktop
telegram.exe.description: Messaging app with cloud sync. Lightweight compared to Electron apps.

whatsapp.exe.name: WhatsApp Desktop
whatsapp.exe.description: Desktop client for WhatsApp messaging. Electron-based.

notepad++.exe.name: Notepad++
notepad++.exe.description: Lightweight code/text editor with syntax highlighting and plugins.

java.exe.name: Java Runtime (Console)
java.exe.description: Runs Java apps with console output. Usage depends on application.

onedrive.exe.name: Microsoft OneDrive
onedrive.exe.description: Cloud storage sync client. CPU spikes during file uploads and indexing.

dropbox.exe.name: Dropbox
dropbox.exe.description: Cloud storage sync. Background indexing can slow down older drives.

avp.exe.name: Kaspersky Antivirus
avp.exe.description: Kaspersky endpoint protection process. Scans can be CPU-heavy.

avgui.exe.name: AVG Antivirus UI
avgui.exe.description: AVG Antivirus user interface. Background guard is lightweight.

mbam.exe.name: Malwarebytes Service
mbam.exe.description: Malwarebytes background protection service. Complements antivirus.

xmrig.exe.name: XMRig Miner
xmrig.exe.description: Monero cryptocurrency miner. Should NOT be running unless deliberately installed. Flag as suspicious.

cpuminer.exe.name: CPU Miner
cpuminer.exe.description: Generic cryptocurrency miner. Unauthorized presence = malware.

ethminer.exe.name: Ethereum Miner
ethminer.exe.description: Ethereum/ETC GPU miner. Unauthorized presence = malware.

nicehash.exe.name: NiceHash Miner
nicehash.exe.description: Crypto mining marketplace client. Legitimate if user-installed; suspicious otherwise.

system idle process.name: System Idle Process
system idle process.description: Pseudo-process representing unused CPU time. High % = CPU is free and healthy. Never a problem.

memcompression.name: Memory Compression
memcompression.description: Compresses rarely-used RAM pages to free physical memory. High usage indicates memory pressure.

gameinputsvc.exe.name: Game Input Service
gameinputsvc.exe.description: Xbox Game Input API service. Handles controller and gamepad input for PC games.

werfault.exe.name: Windows Error Reporting
werfault.exe.description: Collects crash reports and sends diagnostics to Microsoft. CPU spike occurs briefly after app crashes.

compattelrunner.exe.name: Microsoft Compatibility Telemetry
compattelrunner.exe.description: Periodically collects and sends compatibility telemetry to Microsoft. Known to cause unexpected CPU/disk spikes.

backgroundtaskhost.exe.name: Background Task Host
backgroundtaskhost.exe.description: Hosts background tasks from UWP apps and Windows services. Multiple instances are normal.

settingssynchost.exe.name: Settings Sync Host
settingssynchost.exe.description: Syncs Windows settings and preferences across devices via Microsoft account. Runs periodically.

ctfmon.exe.name: CTF Loader
ctfmon.exe.description: Manages text input methods and handwriting/speech recognition. Required for IME (input method editors).

searchhost.exe.name: Windows Search Host
searchhost.exe.description: Core Windows Search indexing host (Win11). Replaces SearchIndexer.exe. CPU spikes during indexing.

searchapp.exe.name: Windows Search App
searchapp.exe.description: UWP process rendering the taskbar search interface. Suspends when search is not in use.

securityhealthsystray.exe.name: Windows Security Tray
securityhealthsystray.exe.description: System tray icon for Windows Security Center. Monitors AV, firewall, and update status.

usocoreworker.exe.name: Update Session Orchestrator Worker
usocoreworker.exe.description: Coordinates Windows Update download and install sessions. CPU/disk spike while updates download.

wuauclt.exe.name: Windows Update Client
wuauclt.exe.description: Legacy Windows Update client. Mostly replaced by USOCoreWorker in Win10/11 but can still appear.

tiworker.exe.name: Windows Modules Installer Worker
tiworker.exe.description: Installs and removes Windows features and updates. High CPU/disk during updates is normal and temporary.

sihclient.exe.name: Service Initiated Healing Client
sihclient.exe.description: Detects and repairs broken Windows Update components. Runs occasionally in background.

mobsync.exe.name: Microsoft Sync Center
mobsync.exe.description: Synchronizes files with offline network shares. Rarely needed in home/gaming environments.

ntoskrnl.exe.name: NT OS Kernel
ntoskrnl.exe.description: Windows kernel and process scheduler. Always present. High CPU here means kernel-level activity (drivers, DPCs, interrupts).

textinputhost.exe.name: Text Input Host
textinputhost.exe.description: Hosts the touch keyboard and handwriting panel in Windows 10/11. Lightweight when not in use.

startmenuexperiencehost.exe.name: Start Menu Experience Host
startmenuexperiencehost.exe.description: Renders the Windows 10/11 Start menu as a separate UWP process. Restarts automatically if it crashes.

shellexperiencehost.exe.name: Windows Shell Experience Host
shellexperiencehost.exe.description: Hosts UWP shell elements: Action Center, system clock, taskbar transparency effects.

lockapp.exe.name: Lock Screen App
lockapp.exe.description: Renders the Windows lock screen. Automatically suspended when PC is unlocked.

wsappx.exe.name: Windows Store App Host
wsappx.exe.description: Background host for Microsoft Store (ClipSVC + AppXSvc). Disk/CPU spikes during app installations.

lsm.exe.name: Local Session Manager
lsm.exe.description: Manages user sessions and Remote Desktop connections. Critical system process; always tiny footprint.

w32tm.exe.name: Windows Time Service
w32tm.exe.description: Synchronizes system clock with NTP time servers. Runs periodically; near-zero normal footprint.

wlanext.exe.name: WLAN Extensibility Module
wlanext.exe.description: Hosts third-party Wi-Fi adapter driver extensions under WLAN AutoConfig service.

smartscreen.exe.name: Windows SmartScreen
smartscreen.exe.description: Checks downloaded files and URLs against Microsoft reputation database. Brief spike when opening new files.

nvtelemetrycontainer.exe.name: NVIDIA Telemetry Container
nvtelemetrycontainer.exe.description: Collects NVIDIA driver usage telemetry. Not essential; can be disabled via Services without side effects.

nvwmi64.exe.name: NVIDIA WMI Provider
nvwmi64.exe.description: Exposes NVIDIA GPU data via Windows WMI interface. Used by monitoring and reporting tools.

amdrsserv.exe.name: AMD Radeon Settings Service
amdrsserv.exe.description: Background service for AMD Radeon Software suite. Manages driver features, overlay, and notifications.

amdow.exe.name: AMD Radeon Overlay Worker
amdow.exe.description: AMD in-game overlay worker process. Displays FPS counter and performance metrics during gameplay.

radeoninstaller.exe.name: AMD Radeon Installer
radeoninstaller.exe.description: AMD driver and software installer. Should only appear during driver updates.

igfxem.exe.name: Intel Graphics Module
igfxem.exe.description: Intel integrated GPU event monitor. Handles hotkeys and display switching for Intel graphics.

rtkaudioservice64.exe.name: Realtek Audio Service
rtkaudioservice64.exe.description: Realtek HD Audio background service. Manages audio hardware detection and driver events.

rtkngui64.exe.name: Realtek Audio Manager
rtkngui64.exe.description: Realtek HD Audio Manager UI for speaker, headphone, and microphone configuration.

ksp_x64.exe.name: Kerbal Space Program
ksp_x64.exe.description: Space flight simulation. Physics engine is single-threaded — CPU pegs one core with large vessels.

cs2.exe.name: Counter-Strike 2
cs2.exe.description: Tactical FPS on Source 2 engine. GPU-heavy; benefits from high-frequency RAM and fast single-core CPU.

eldenring.exe.name: Elden Ring
eldenring.exe.description: Action RPG. GPU-intensive with poor multi-core CPU scaling. Known for shader compilation stutters.

cyberpunk2077.exe.name: Cyberpunk 2077
cyberpunk2077.exe.description: Open-world RPG. Heavy GPU and CPU demand. Ray tracing and Path Tracing can saturate high-end GPUs fully.

witcher3.exe.name: The Witcher 3
witcher3.exe.description: Open-world RPG. Next-Gen update adds ray tracing. Moderately CPU-heavy; scales well with GPU.

rocketleague.exe.name: Rocket League
rocketleague.exe.description: Vehicular soccer game. Good optimization; runs on mid-range hardware. Requires Epic Games.

r5apex.exe.name: Apex Legends
r5apex.exe.description: Battle royale FPS on Source engine. CPU-heavy; sensitive to core count and clock frequency.

destiny2.exe.name: Destiny 2
destiny2.exe.description: Online action-RPG FPS. GPU and CPU intensive. Requires persistent internet connection.

overwatch.exe.name: Overwatch 2
overwatch.exe.description: Team hero shooter. Well-optimized for its visuals. Runs through Battle.net launcher.

pubg.exe.name: PUBG: Battlegrounds
pubg.exe.description: Battle royale on Unreal Engine. Historically CPU-heavy. BattlEye anti-cheat runs alongside.

dota2.exe.name: Dota 2
dota2.exe.description: MOBA on Source 2 engine. Scalable performance; playable on low-end hardware at low settings.

escapefromtarkov.exe.name: Escape from Tarkov
escapefromtarkov.exe.description: Hardcore tactical shooter. Known for extremely high RAM and CPU usage. Generally poor optimization.

rainbowsix.exe.name: Rainbow Six Siege
rainbowsix.exe.description: Tactical 5v5 FPS. Well-optimized, runs on a wide range of hardware with solid scaling.

starfield.exe.name: Starfield
starfield.exe.description: Space RPG on Creation Engine 2. Very CPU-heavy; strongly prefers high single-core clock speeds.

hogwartslegacy.exe.name: Hogwarts Legacy
hogwartslegacy.exe.description: Open-world RPG on Unreal Engine 4. Heavy GPU load; DX12 stutters on first shader compilation run.

warframe.exe.name: Warframe
warframe.exe.description: Free-to-play action RPG shooter. Decent optimization; shader compilation causes initial stutters.

pathofexile.exe.name: Path of Exile
pathofexile.exe.description: Action RPG. Heavy RAM usage with large on-screen effects; known for memory leaks during long sessions.

diablo4.exe.name: Diablo IV
diablo4.exe.description: Online action RPG. GPU and RAM intensive. Requires Battle.net and active internet.

wow.exe.name: World of Warcraft
wow.exe.description: MMORPG. Scales well across hardware. Crowded raid environments spike CPU significantly.

baldursgate3.exe.name: Baldur's Gate 3
baldursgate3.exe.description: Turn-based RPG on Divinity 4.0 engine. Very GPU and RAM heavy; Act 3 is especially demanding.

valheim.exe.name: Valheim
valheim.exe.description: Viking survival sandbox. Hard single-threaded CPU bottleneck. World generation causes significant spikes.

stardewvalley.exe.name: Stardew Valley
stardewvalley.exe.description: Pixel-art farming RPG. Extremely lightweight. Rarely causes any performance concerns.

terraria.exe.name: Terraria
terraria.exe.description: 2D action sandbox game. Very lightweight. Excellent choice for low-end hardware.

acvalhalla.exe.name: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
acvalhalla.exe.description: Open-world action RPG. Heavy GPU and CPU demand. Requires Ubisoft Connect launcher.

devenv.exe.name: Visual Studio IDE
devenv.exe.description: Full Visual Studio IDE. Very resource-heavy; solution loading and IntelliSense spike CPU and I/O.

pycharm64.exe.name: PyCharm
pycharm64.exe.description: Python IDE on IntelliJ platform. JVM-based; high memory use. Indexing spikes CPU on project open.

idea64.exe.name: IntelliJ IDEA
idea64.exe.description: Java/Kotlin/Groovy IDE. JVM-based; high RAM. Project indexing and Gradle imports are CPU-intensive.

rider64.exe.name: JetBrains Rider
rider64.exe.description: .NET/C# IDE combining IntelliJ and ReSharper. Strong alternative to Visual Studio.

clion64.exe.name: CLion
clion64.exe.description: C/C++ IDE with clangd backend. Indexing large codebases causes heavy CPU and I/O usage.

webstorm64.exe.name: WebStorm
webstorm64.exe.description: JavaScript/TypeScript IDE. node_modules indexing causes heavy I/O on project startup.

cursor.exe.name: Cursor IDE
cursor.exe.description: AI-powered code editor built on VS Code. Integrates LLM features inline. Similar resources to VS Code.

sublime_text.exe.name: Sublime Text
sublime_text.exe.description: Lightweight code editor. Instant startup and smooth editing even on very large files.

postman.exe.name: Postman
postman.exe.description: API testing and development platform. Electron-based; memory grows with large collections open.

dbeaver.exe.name: DBeaver
dbeaver.exe.description: Universal database GUI. Java-based; RAM grows with open connections and large result sets.

fork.exe.name: Fork Git Client
fork.exe.description: Fast, native Git GUI for Windows. Very low resource footprint compared to Electron alternatives.

gitkraken.exe.name: GitKraken
gitkraken.exe.description: Feature-rich Git GUI client. Electron-based; heavier than native alternatives.

dotnet.exe.name: .NET Runtime Host
dotnet.exe.description: Hosts .NET Core / .NET 5+ applications. Resource usage depends entirely on the application it runs.

msbuild.exe.name: MSBuild
msbuild.exe.description: Microsoft build engine for .NET and C++ projects. CPU-heavy during compilation; exits when done.

windbg.exe.name: WinDbg
windbg.exe.description: Windows kernel and user-mode debugger. CPU spikes when loading symbols or analyzing crash dumps.

acrobat.exe.name: Adobe Acrobat
acrobat.exe.description: Full Adobe Acrobat PDF editor. Heavy initial load; background ARM updater runs periodically.

acrord32.exe.name: Adobe Acrobat Reader
acrord32.exe.description: Free PDF reader. Lighter than full Acrobat. Background Adobe Update Manager runs silently.

soffice.bin.name: LibreOffice
soffice.bin.description: Core LibreOffice process shared by Writer, Calc, and Impress. Free, open-source MS Office alternative.

figma.exe.name: Figma Desktop
figma.exe.description: UI/UX design tool desktop app. Electron-based; large files with many frames consume significant RAM.

resolve.exe.name: DaVinci Resolve
resolve.exe.description: Professional video editor and color grader. GPU-accelerated; VRAM usage hits 8GB+ on 4K projects.

afterfx.exe.name: Adobe After Effects
afterfx.exe.description: Motion graphics and compositing. RAM cache fills very fast; rendering saturates CPU and GPU.

premiere.exe.name: Adobe Premiere Pro
premiere.exe.description: Professional video editor. GPU-accelerated effects and encoding. Export jobs sustain 100% CPU for extended periods.

blender.exe.name: Blender
blender.exe.description: 3D modeling, animation, and rendering suite. CPU and GPU rendering can max out all system resources.

gimp-2.10.exe.name: GIMP
gimp-2.10.exe.description: Open-source image editor. Moderate resource use; large images or heavy filters spike CPU.

inkscape.exe.name: Inkscape
inkscape.exe.description: Open-source vector graphics editor. Lightweight on idle; complex SVG rendering can spike CPU.

audacity.exe.name: Audacity
audacity.exe.description: Open-source audio editor. Processing effects on long tracks can be CPU-heavy.

handbrake.exe.name: HandBrake
handbrake.exe.description: Video transcoder. Encoding maxes out CPU (all cores). GPU acceleration via NVENC or QuickSync reduces load.

galaxyclient.exe.name: GOG Galaxy Client
galaxyclient.exe.description: GOG DRM-free game store and launcher. Lightweight; can integrate other launcher libraries.

upc.exe.name: Ubisoft Connect
upc.exe.description: Ubisoft game launcher and store. Required for all Ubisoft titles. Background overlay adds minor overhead.

eadesktop.exe.name: EA App
eadesktop.exe.description: EA's game launcher replacing Origin. Required for EA titles. Electron-based with moderate overhead.

eabackgroundservice.exe.name: EA Background Service
eabackgroundservice.exe.description: EA App background service running at startup. Handles game entitlements and update checks.

rockstarservice.exe.name: Rockstar Games Service
rockstarservice.exe.description: Background service for Rockstar Games Launcher. Required to run GTA V and Red Dead Redemption 2 on PC.

gamingservices.exe.name: Xbox Gaming Services
gamingservices.exe.description: Xbox / PC Game Pass delivery service. Required for installing and running Game Pass titles.

xblgamesave.exe.name: Xbox Game Save
xblgamesave.exe.description: Syncs Xbox Live cloud game saves for Windows games linked to an Xbox account.

playnite.exe.name: Playnite
playnite.exe.description: Open-source unified game library manager. Integrates Steam, GOG, Epic, Itch, and more.

overwolf.exe.name: Overwolf
overwolf.exe.description: In-game overlay platform hosting apps like CurseForge and Outplayed. Adds noticeable in-game overhead.

gamebar.exe.name: Xbox Game Bar
gamebar.exe.description: Windows in-game overlay (Win+G). Provides FPS counter, screenshots, and clip recording via GameDVR.

gamebarftserver.exe.name: Game Bar Presence Writer
gamebarftserver.exe.description: Background component for Xbox Game Bar game detection. Runs even when overlay is closed.

battleye.exe.name: BattlEye Anti-Cheat
battleye.exe.description: Kernel-level anti-cheat used by PUBG, Rainbow Six, DayZ, and others. Requires administrator rights.

easyanticheat.exe.name: Easy Anti-Cheat
easyanticheat.exe.description: Anti-cheat service used in Apex Legends, Fortnite, EFT, and many others. Kernel-level driver.

faceit.exe.name: FACEIT Anti-Cheat
faceit.exe.description: Kernel-level anti-cheat for FACEIT competitive platform. Must run to join FACEIT-ranked matches.

avguard.exe.name: Avira Protection Guard
avguard.exe.description: Avira antivirus real-time file protection service. Scans file access events continuously.

avastui.exe.name: Avast Antivirus UI
avastui.exe.description: Avast user interface process. Background guard service (AvastSvc.exe) runs independently.

mbamtray.exe.name: Malwarebytes Tray
mbamtray.exe.description: Malwarebytes system tray notification icon. Lightweight UI component for the MBAMService.

bdservicehost.exe.name: Bitdefender Service Host
bdservicehost.exe.description: Core Bitdefender endpoint protection service. Real-time scanning causes brief CPU spikes on file access.

ekrn.exe.name: ESET Kernel Service
ekrn.exe.description: ESET NOD32/Internet Security core engine. Generally lighter on resources than comparable AV products.

sentinelagent.exe.name: SentinelOne Agent
sentinelagent.exe.description: Enterprise EDR security agent. Common in corporate environments. Uses behavioral AI threat detection.

mbamservice.exe.name: Malwarebytes Service
mbamservice.exe.description: Core Malwarebytes background protection engine running alongside primary AV software.

mpcmdrun.exe.name: Windows Defender CLI
mpcmdrun.exe.description: Command-line scanner for Windows Defender. Used by scheduled scans and automation scripts.

googledrivefs.exe.name: Google Drive File Stream

megasync.exe.name: MEGAsync
megasync.exe.description: MEGA cloud storage sync client with end-to-end encryption. Large syncs drive significant I/O.

filezilla.exe.name: FileZilla

winscp.exe.name: WinSCP
winscp.exe.description: SFTP, SCP, and FTP client for Windows. Standard tool for secure file transfers to Linux servers.

putty.exe.name: PuTTY
putty.exe.description: SSH and Telnet client. Extremely lightweight. Industry standard for remote server terminal access.

tailscale.exe.name: Tailscale
tailscale.exe.description: WireGuard-based zero-config mesh VPN. Extremely low overhead; creates private network between devices.

nordvpn.exe.name: NordVPN
nordvpn.exe.description: Commercial VPN client. Active tunneling increases latency; kill switch runs as persistent background service.

openvpn.exe.name: OpenVPN

proxifier.exe.name: Proxifier
proxifier.exe.description: Routes TCP connections through proxy servers system-wide. Used for SOCKS5/HTTP tunneling.

wireguard.exe.name: WireGuard
wireguard.exe.description: Modern kernel-level VPN implementation. Significantly lower overhead than OpenVPN or IPSec.

icue.exe.name: Corsair iCUE
icue.exe.description: RGB lighting and peripheral management for Corsair devices. Known CPU overhead with many connected devices.

lghub.exe.name: Logitech G HUB

synapse3.exe.name: Razer Synapse 3

steelseriesgg.exe.name: SteelSeries GG

hwinfo64.exe.name: HWiNFO64

cpuz.exe.name: CPU-Z

rivatunerstatisticsserver.exe.description: Frame rate limiter and in-game OSD rendering backend. Required by MSI Afterburner overlay.

aida64.exe.description: System diagnostics, sensor monitoring, and stability stress-testing tool. Burn-in tests max all hardware.

furmark.exe.name: FurMark GPU Stress Test
furmark.exe.description: Maximizes GPU to 100% load for stability and thermal testing. Not for regular use — extreme heat generator.
